@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+ROOT=$(cd "$(dirname "$0")/.." && pwd)
+source "$ROOT/version.env"
+OUTPUT="$ROOT/Sources/imsg/Version.swift"
+mkdir -p "$(dirname "$OUTPUT")"
+cat > "$OUTPUT" <<SWIFT
+// Generated by scripts/generate-version.sh. Do not edit.
+enum IMsgVersion {
+  static let current = "${MARKETING_VERSION}"
+}
+SWIFT
